# traces

One raw recorded agent run, captured whole before analysis (vs a trajectory, the same run once analyzed); has spans, a body, and the issues it rolled up into. Dashboard: Runs.

**When to use:** Inspect one run by ID, read its spans or full body, or list and filter recent runs by status, tag, model, or finding kind. For totals and timelines use analytics; for the analyzed unit use trajectories.

> **Footgun:** `--status` means run status (ok/error) on `list`, but span status (ERROR, uppercase) on `list-spans`.

## Commands

| Command | Invocation | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `get` | `bentolabs traces get <trace_id>` | one run's metadata, rollups, status |
| `get-body` | `bentolabs traces get-body <trace_id>` | the run's full captured payload (vs get = metadata only) |
| `get-span` | `bentolabs traces get-span <span_id>` | one step by span id |
| `list` | `bentolabs traces list [--limit --sort --before --before-id --cursor --start-time ...]` | recent runs, filterable |
| `list-issues` | `bentolabs traces list-issues <trace_id>` | issues this run rolled up into |
| `list-spans` | `bentolabs traces list-spans <trace_id> [--limit --after --after-id --status]` | the steps inside the run |

Confirm exact arguments with `bentolabs traces <command> --help`.
